data.biography: Ronald "RJ" Cyler II (born March 21, 1995) is an American actor. He is best known for his roles in Me and Earl and the Dying Girl, Power Rangers, I'm Dying Up Here and Scream.
data.name: RJ Cyler

data.biography: Jimmy O. Yang (born June 11, 1987) is a stand-up comedian and actor. He stars as Jian-Yang on HBO's Silicon Valley (2014), Bernard Tai in the film Crazy Rich Asians and as real-life hero Dun Meng in the film Patriots Day (2016). As a stand-up, he performed on The Arsenio Hall Show and received a rare standing ovation. Jimmy can also be seen on season 9 of It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia as Charlie's dear friend Tang-See. Jimmy is fluent in three Chinese dialects: Mandarin, Cantonese, Shanghainese.
data.name: Jimmy O. Yang

data.biography: Jimmy O. Yang é um ator, comediante e escritor norte-americano de Hong Kong, mais conhecido por protagonizar Jian-Yang na série de comédia da HBO Silicon Valley.
欧阳万成是一名香港裔美国男演员、单口喜剧演员和作家，以在HBO喜剧《硅谷》饰演靳阳而知名。 1987年6月11日，欧阳万成在香港出生，曾经在香港华仁书院接受一年的教育，13岁时随家人移民美国，希望他借此受到更好的教育。
data.name: 欧阳万成

data.biography:
歐陽萬成是一名香港裔美國男演員、單口喜劇演員和作家，以在 HBO 喜劇《矽谷》飾演靳陽而知名。

1987 年 6 月 11 日，歐陽萬成在香港出生，曾經在香港華仁書院接受一年的教育，13 歲時隨家人移民美國，希望他藉此受到更好的教育。
data.name: 歐陽萬成

data.biography: Raymond Lam Fung is a Hong Kong actor and singer known primarily for his roles with local TV network, TVB.
data.name: Raymond Lam Fung

data.biography:
林峯，1979年12月8日生于福建厦门。华语流行乐男歌手、演员。厦门演艺协会名誉会长。

林峰自幼拜名师学唱歌，1999年以主持人兼记者出道。2001年凭借首部古装剧《寻秦记》获得壹电视大奖最有前途新人奖，2004年主演武侠剧《大唐双龙传》在马来西亚斩获我的至爱男主角奖。2008年入选壹电视大奖十大艺人第一位，凭借功夫剧《太极》荣膺亚洲电视大奖最佳男主角奖。2011年，主演的古装爱情片《白蛇传说》登顶国际票房榜周冠军。2014年，主演古装剧《卫子夫》夺内地暑期卫视黄金档收视冠军，主演警匪剧《使徒行者》刷新港剧播放量历史成绩，凭借汉武帝和卧底爆seed第2次获得华鼎奖中国最佳电视剧男演员奖 。2017年，凭借《独步天下》皇太极一角夺得丝路凝聚力盛典最佳男演员奖。2018年，主演悬疑警匪片《神探大战》和影版《寻秦记》
data.name: 林峯

data.biography: 林峯，生於中國福建省廈門市，原名林匯文，後改名林逸峰，香港男歌手及演員。
data.name: 林峯

data.biography: Lâm Phong (giản thể: 林峯; phồn thể: 林峰; bính âm: Làm Fūng, tên tiếng Anh: Raymond Lam, sinh ngày 8 tháng 12 năm 1979 tại Hạ Môn, Phúc Kiến, Trung Quốc) là một nam ca sĩ, người dẫn chương trình kiêm diễn viên truyền hình và diễn viên điện ảnh nổi tiếng Hồng Kông. Anh từng là diễn viên độc quyền của hãng TVB. Trong làng giải trí Hong Kong, Lâm Phong nổi tiếng là tài tử có gia thế giàu có. Anh là con trai ông Lâm Quốc Hoa, ông trùm bất động sản có tiếng, được mọi người mệnh danh là Lý Gia Thành của Hạ Môn. Theo Sky Post, giá trị tài sản ròng của gia đình họ Lâm vào khoảng 2 tỷ HKD (gần 6.000 tỷ đồng).
data.name: Lâm Phong

data.biography: John Tang Yat-Kwan was born on 24 October 1976. He is an actor, known for Yesteryou, Yesterme, Yesterday, The True Hero
data.name: John Tang Yat-Kwan

data.biography:
邓一君（John Tang Yat Kwan，1976年10月24日－），前香港童星及演员，九岁时经老师介绍于香港电台教育电视开始演出，曾参与多出电影及电视剧。他曾凭1994年《记得...香蕉成熟时》内杨醒波一角，获提名香港电影金像奖最佳新演员奖。

2005年退出娱乐圈，于宏利金融担任专业理财顾问，其后获擢升为高级分行经理及考取CFP认可财务策划师专业资格。于2006年结婚，育有一女邓颂情（Kristen）。
data.name: 邓一君

data.biography:
鄧一君，前香港演員，九歲時經聖若瑟小學音樂老師介紹於香港電台教育電視開始演出，曾參與多齣電影及電視劇。他曾憑 1994 年《記得. . . 香蕉成熟時》內楊醒波一角，獲提名角逐香港電影金像獎最佳新演員獎。

2005 年退出娛樂圈，其後考取 CFP 認可財務策劃師專業資格，現擔任財富管理公司總監。
data.name: 鄧一君

data.biography: Aoba Kawai is an actress, known for Meatball Machine (2005), Wheel of Fortune and Fantasy (2021) and Tamagawa Kuyakusho of the Dead (2014).

data.biography:
Aoba Kawai (河井 青葉, Kawai Aoba, 16 de noviembre de 1981)es una actriz y exmodelo japonesa originaria de Tokio que está representada por la agencia Breath Inc.. Mide 166 cm y su tipo de sangre es A.

Fue descubierta a los 15 años, etapa en la que trabajó como modelo para revistas como non-no y PeeWee. En sus veintitantos inició su actividad como actriz, participando en largometrajes como «Girlfriend» y «Tomoshibi». En cine ha intervenido en producciones como «Kabukicho Love Hotel», por la que recibió el premio a la mejor actriz de reparto del Festival de Cine de Yokohama en 2016. También participó en «La ruleta de la fortuna y la fantasía», película seleccionada en la competición oficial de la Berlinale y galardonada con el Gran Premio del Jurado (Oso de Plata). Por este trabajo obtuvo el premio a la mejor actriz protagonista del Festival de Cine de Takasaki en 2022. En televisión ha aparecido en series como «TOKYO MER ~Hashiru kinkyuu kyuumeishitsu~» y «El hundimiento de Japón: Un pueblo esperanzado».
data.name: Aoba Kawai

data.biography: Myha'la Jael Herrold (/maɪˈhɑːlə/; born April 6, 1996) is an American actress, known mononymously as Myha'la. She is known for her role as Harper Stern in the British television drama Industry and her role as Jordan in the comedic horror film Bodies Bodies Bodies. She acted primarily in theater roles before being cast in Industry, including on the Broadway production of The Book of Mormon.
data.name: Myha'la

data.biography: Lin Zilu, uma atriz de cinema e televisão da China Continental, formou-se no Instituto de Artes Visuais de Xangai, com especialização em cinema e televisão e performance dramática.

毕彦君，鞍山话剧团国家一级演员，毕业于上海戏剧学院表演干部进修班。中国戏剧家协会会员，曾荣获首届辽宁省话剧演员艺术表演赛一等奖、鞍山市新时期文艺十年贡献奖。

1993年借调到全总文工团话剧团当演员，曾参演《少帅传奇》、《夜幕下的哈尔滨》等10余部话剧，并曾出演《三国演义》、《大宅门》等数十部电视剧，《梅兰芳》 、《建国大业》等多部电影，塑造了一大批人物形象。还曾担任《苏东坡》、《追日》、《人间芙蓉色》、《长流不息》乖电视剧副导演。改编《巴尔扎克雕像》等6部广播剧、《对话独白与沉默》等2部电视剧、《秋诀》等2部话剧。

2020年后，陆续出演了一系列重大历史题材电视剧，其中包括在《觉醒年代》中饰演辜鸿铭，在《大决战》中饰演何应钦。2023年4月23日，毕彦君参演的青春励志革命历史剧《战火中的青春》上映，在剧中饰演张伯苓；8月5日，主演的电视剧《铁马豪情的日子》播出。2024年1月8日，毕彦君参演电视剧《我们的翻译官》播出。
data.name: 毕彦君

data.biography:
畢彥君，鞍山話劇團國家一級演員，畢業於上海戲劇學院表演幹部進修班。中國戲劇家協會會員，曾榮獲首屆遼寧省話劇演員藝術表演賽一等獎、鞍山市新時期文藝十年貢獻獎。

1993 年借調到全總文工團話劇團當演員，曾參演《少帥傳奇》、《夜幕下的哈爾濱》等 10 餘部話劇，並曾出演《三國演義》、《大宅門》等數十部電視劇，《梅蘭芳》 、《建國大業》等多部電影，塑造了一大批人物形象。還曾擔任《蘇東坡》、《追日》、《人間芙蓉色》、《長流不息》乖電視劇副導演。改編《巴爾紮克雕像》等 6 部廣播劇、《對話獨白與沉默》等 2 部電視劇、《秋訣》等 2 部話劇。

2020 年後，陸續出演了一系列重大歷史題材電視劇，其中包括在《覺醒年代》中飾演辜鴻銘，在《大決戰》中飾演何應欽。2023 年 4 月 23 日，畢彥君參演的青春勵志革命歷史劇《戰火中的青春》上映，在劇中飾演張伯苓；8 月 5 日，主演的電視劇《鐵馬豪情的日子》播出。2024 年 1 月 8 日，畢彥君參演電視劇《我們的翻譯官》播出。
data.name: 畢彥君

data.biography:
Poh Natthawut Skidjai is an actor from Phetchaburi. He has a Bachelor of Civil Engineering from Rangsit University and an MBA from Southeastern University (England)

Active in the industry since 2000, Poh was under contract with Channel 7 from 2001 to 2009. The next year, he signed a contract with Channel 3.

Poh married actor Aey Pornthip Skidjai (née Wongkitjanon) in 2012.
data.name: Natthawut Skidjai

data.biography:
Tony Leung Chiu-Wai (Chinese: 梁朝偉, born 27 June 1962) is a Hong Kong actor and singer. He is considered one of Asia's most successful and internationally recognised actors and was named as "Small Tiger" among the Five Tiger Generals of TVB. He has won many international acting prizes, including the Cannes Film Festival award for Best Actor for his performance in Wong Kar-wai's film In the Mood for Love. Leung is widely considered the best native Hong Kong actor of his generation. He was named by CNN as one of "Asia's 25 Greatest Actors of All Time".

Leung is known for his collaborations with director Wong Kar-wai, with whom he has worked in seven films including Chungking Express (1994), Happy Together (1997), In the Mood for Love (2000), and The Grandmaster (2013). He also appeared in three Venice Film Festival Golden Lion-winning films, including A City of Sadness (1989), Cyclo (1995) and Lust, Caution (2007), directed by Ang Lee. Leung also stars in the Academy Award-nominated film Hero, and the box office hits Hard Boiled (1992) and Infernal Affairs (2002). Leung was cast as the Mandarin in the Marvel Cinematic Universe film Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings (2021).

Leung has a comprehensive set of awards that he has won in a career that began in the 1980s. For In the Mood for Love, Leung earned the Best Actor award at the Cannes Film Festival. He is also a six-time winner at the Hong Kong Film Awards and three-time winner at the Golden Horse Film Awards, holding the record for most awards in the Best Actor category. The 2002 book East Asian Film Stars describes Leung as "undoubtedly one of the most successful and widely-acclaimed Hong Kong actors of his generation, with a broad and diverse filmography."
data.name: Tony Leung Chiu-wai

data.biography: 梁朝伟，1962年6月27日出生于中国香港，祖籍广东省台山市，中国香港男演员、歌手，国家一级演员，毕业于香港无线训练班第11期。1982年考入无线电视艺员训练班，正式进入演艺界。20世纪80年代拍摄了多部电视剧。1984年因出演电视剧《鹿鼎记》中的韦小宝一角受到关注。1990年主演电影《喋血街头》。1994年凭借电影《重庆森林》获得第14届香港电影金像奖最佳男主角奖、第31届台湾电影金马奖最佳男主角奖。1997年凭借电影《春光乍泄》获得第17届香港电影金像奖最佳男主角奖。1998年主演电影《暗花》。2000年凭借电影《花样年华》获得第53届戛纳国际电影节最佳男演员奖以及第20届香港电影金像奖最佳男主角。2002年主演张艺谋执导的电影《英雄》。2003年凭借电影《无间道》获得第22届香港电影金像奖最佳男主角奖、第40届台湾电影金马奖最佳男主角奖。2005年凭借电影《2046》获得第24届香港电影金像奖最佳男主角奖。2007年凭借电影《色·戒》获得第44届台湾电影金马奖最佳男主角奖。2011年主演王家卫执导的影片《一代宗师》。2014年受邀担任第64届柏林国际电影节主竞赛单元评委。2015年1月8日，主演《一代宗师》3D版上映。同年，接拍由王家卫监制的电影《摆渡人》。2016年11月拍摄古装喜剧片《捉妖记2》。2015年获得法国文化部颁授的“法国艺术与文学军官勋章” 。2017年3月，主演电影《捉妖记2》
data.name: 梁朝伟

data.biography: 梁朝偉，1962 年 6 月 27 日出生於香港，祖籍廣東省台山市，香港男演員、歌手，國家一級演員，畢業於香港無線訓練班第 11 期。1982 年考入無線電視藝員訓練班，正式進入演藝界。20 世紀 80 年代拍攝了多部電視劇。1984 年因出演電視劇《鹿鼎記》中的韋小寶一角受到關注。1990 年主演電影《喋血街頭》。1994 年憑藉電影《重慶森林》獲得第 14 屆香港電影金像獎最佳男主角獎、第 31 屆台灣電影金馬獎最佳男主角獎。1997 年憑藉電影《春光乍洩》獲得第 17 屆香港電影金像獎最佳男主角獎。1998 年主演電影《暗花》。2000 年憑藉電影《花樣年華》獲得第 53 屆戛納國際電影節最佳男演員獎以及第 20 屆香港電影金像獎最佳男主角。2002 年主演張藝謀執導的電影《英雄》。2003 年憑藉電影《無間道》獲得第 22 屆香港電影金像獎最佳男主角獎、第 40 屆台灣電影金馬獎最佳男主角獎。2005 年憑藉電影《2046》獲得第 24 屆香港電影金像獎最佳男主角獎。2007 年憑藉電影《色，戒》獲得第 44 屆台灣電影金馬獎最佳男主角獎。2011 年主演王家衞執導的影片《一代宗師》。2014 年受邀擔任第 64 屆柏林國際電影節主競賽單元評委。2015 年 1 月 8 日，主演《一代宗師》3D 版上映。同年，接拍由王家衞監製的電影《擺渡人》。2016 年 11 月拍攝古裝喜劇片《捉妖記 2》。2015 年獲得法國文化部頒授的“法國藝術與文學軍官勳章” 。2017 年 3 月，主演電影《捉妖記 2》
data.name: 梁朝偉

data.biography: Tony Leung Chiu-wai è un attore hongkonghese.
data.name: Tony Leung Chiu-wai

data.biography: Lương Triều Vỹ là một diễn viên người Hồng Kông. Từng được ví như "Clark Gable của châu Á", Lương Triều Vỹ là một trong những diễn viên châu Á xuất sắc nhất mọi thời đại.
data.name: Lương Triều Vỹ

data.biography:
Tony Leung Chiu-Wai (Çince: 梁朝偉, 27 Haziran 1962 doğumlu) Hong Konglu aktör ve şarkıcı. Asya'nın en başarılı ve uluslararası alanda tanınan aktörlerinden biri olarak kabul ediliyor ve TVB'nin Beş Kaplan Generali arasında "Küçük Kaplan" (Small Tiger) olarak adlandırılıyor. Wong Kar-wai'nin In the Mood for Love filmindeki performansıyla Cannes Film Festivali En İyi Erkek Oyuncu ödülü de dahil olmak üzere birçok uluslararası oyunculuk ödülü kazandı. Leung, kendi kuşağının en iyi yerli Hong Kong oyuncusu olarak kabul ediliyor. CNN tarafından "Asya'nın Tüm Zamanların En Büyük 25 Aktörü" arasında gösterildi.

Leung, Chungking Express (1994), Happy Together (1997), In the Mood for Love (2000) ve The Grandmaster (2013) dahil olmak üzere yedi filmde birlikte çalıştığı yönetmen Wong Kar-wai ile yaptığı işbirlikleriyle tanınıyor. Ayrıca Ang Lee'nin yönettiği A City of Sadness (1989), Cyclo (1995) ve Lust, Caution (2007) dahil olmak üzere Venedik Film Festivali Altın Aslan ödüllü üç filmde rol aldı. Leung ayrıca Akademi Ödülü'ne aday gösterilen Hero filminde de rol aldı ve Hard Boiled (1992) ve Infernal Affairs (2002) gişe rekorları kırdı. Leung, Marvel Sinematik Evreni filmi Shang-Chi ve On Yüzük Efsanesi'nde (2021) Mandarin rolünü üstlendi.

Leung'un 1980'lerde başlayan kariyerinde kazandığı çok sayıda ödül var. Leung, In the Mood for Love filmiyle Cannes Film Festivali'nde En İyi Erkek Oyuncu ödülünü kazandı. Aynı zamanda Hong Kong Film Ödülleri'nde altı kez, Altın At Film Ödülleri'nde ise üç kez kazanan oyuncu, En İyi Erkek Oyuncu kategorisinde en çok ödül alma rekorunu elinde tutuyor. 2002 tarihli Doğu Asya Film Yıldızları kitabı Leung'u "geniş ve çeşitli filmografisiyle şüphesiz kendi neslinin en başarılı ve en çok beğenilen Hong Kong oyuncularından biri" olarak tanımlıyor.
data.name: Tony Leung Chiu-wai

data.biography: A Hungarian native, Bernadett is a London-based actress, most commonly recognized for her starring role in the Hungarian feature film, PAPPA PIA. She started her international career in a BBC mini-series, FLEMING, portraying Ilsa, who takes revenge on a Nazi officer who killed her family. Bernadett recently appeared in Hong Kong cinemas as Scarlet in the Chinese feature film, SU REN TE GONG. Bernadett studied at the University of Theatre and Film Arts in Budapest, where she was trained by Gabor Zsambeki and Sandor Zsoter. After University, she was an actor in residence for 2 years at Vororsmarty Theatre, one of Hungary's most ambitious theatres with over 140 years of history. Bernadett walked the stage as a lead in several dramas, comedies and musicals. Outside of Vorosmarty Theatre, she starred in THE CLEARING at the Szkene Theatre, which won the ‘Best Independent Play’ Critics’ Award in 2014. Bernadett won't flinch at diving 40 meters underwater, among sharks and octopi, but do not force her to have breakfast outside in the summer--she’s desperately scared of wasps!
data.name: Bernadett Ostorházi

data.biography:
中国香港女演员。

她的形象最明显的特点就是坦诚、明媚、高鼻梁。截止1990年已拍戏23年。9岁时就在影片《快剑》中客串演出。《射雕英雄传》中，把一个命运坎坷、痴恋杨康，内心矛盾重重，郁郁而终的穆念慈，演得感人肺腑。许多观众都把她当作穆念慈的化身。她主演的大量电视剧，在海外也留下了很好的声誉。拿了不少奖
data.name: 杨盼盼

data.biography: Cui Yuxin is a Chinese singer and actor born on July 6, 1996, in Liaoning Province. A graduate of Shanxi University, he entered the entertainment industry in 2017 after appearing on Tencent’s talent program The Coming One, and made his acting debut in the 2019 film Just Met You.

data.biography: 崔雨鑫，男，《明日之子》盛世美颜赛道选手。2017年，他参演了魔力TV旗下的唯美纯爱影像系列短片《小情书》中《三个人的友谊》，2019年，他在由康洪雷、张寒冰执导的《陆战之王》中饰演“霹雳娇娃”郭辉，2020年，他在网剧《唐人街探案》及电影《唐人街探案3》中饰演了医疗集团主席独子，“五大灵童”战队成员程天顺。同年，由其主演的网剧《情歌半首》,《再见青春》也在第二季度上线播出。
data.name: 崔雨鑫

data.biography: 崔雨鑫，男，《明日之子》盛世美顏賽道選手。2017 年，他參演了魔力 TV 旗下的唯美純愛影像系列短片《小情書》中《三個人的友誼》，2019 年，他在由康洪雷、張寒冰執導的《陸戰之王》中飾演“霹靂嬌娃”郭輝，2020 年，他在網劇《唐人街探案》及電影《唐人街探案 3》中飾演了醫療集團主席獨子，“五大靈童”戰隊成員程天順。同年，由其主演的網劇《情歌半首》, 《再見青春》也在第二季度上線播出。
data.name: 崔雨鑫

data.biography:
Aya Yamane (山根 綺, Yamane Aya, born February 4, 1997) is a Japanese voice actress and idol from Kanagawa Prefecture. Member of the J-pop idol group Kleissis. She is affiliated with Aoni Production.

She graduated from Amusement Media General Academy. In 2015, she was selected to audition for the movie Jinro Game Crazy Fox (The Werewolf Game: Crazy Fox) and made her debut as Anna Sumita. In 2018, she became a member of the J-pop idol group Kleissis, derived from the game Arca Last: The World That Ends and the Fruit of the Diva.

Her father is half Chinese and half Japanese, and her mother is one quarter Chinese. She likes cooking, movies, music, guitar and darts. Her special skills are singing and dancing.
data.name: Aya Yamane

data.name: 山根綺

data.biography:
Aya Yamane (山根 綺, Yamane Aya, nacida el 4 de febrero de 1997) es una actriz de doblaje, ídolo y cantante japonesa de la prefectura de Kanagawa. Miembro del grupo idol de J-pop Kleissis. Está afiliada a Aoni Production.

Graduada de la Amusement Media General Academy. En 2015, fue seleccionada en la audición para la película Jinro Game Crazy Fox e hizo su debut como Anna Sumita. En 2018, se convirtió en miembro del grupo idol de J-pop Kleissis, derivado del juego Arca Last: The World That Ends y Fruit of the Diva. El 3 de abril de 2024, hizo su debut como cantante solista lanzando su primer EP «Seishun no Kanashimi», que incluye un total de 5 canciones originales, entre ellas «Seishun no Hajime to Sadan», que fue la primera canción que compuso. El día 6, dio un concierto en su ciudad natal de Yokohama.

Su padre es mitad chino y mitad japonés, y su madre es un cuarto china. Le gusta cocinar, las películas, la música, la guitarra y los dardos. Sus habilidades especiales son cantar y bailar.
data.name: Aya Yamane
อายะ ยามาเนะ

data.biography:
Aya Yamane (山根 綺, Yamane Aya) è una doppiatrice e idol giapponese della prefettura di Kanagawa, nata il 4 febbraio 1997. È membro del gruppo idol J-pop Kleissis. È affiliata alla Aoni Production.

Si è diplomata all'Amusement Media General Academy. Nel 2015 è stata selezionata per un'audizione per il film "Jinro Game Crazy Fox" ("The Werewolf Game: Crazy Fox") e ha debuttato come Anna Sumita. Nel 2018 è diventata membro del gruppo idol J-pop Kleissis, derivato dal gioco "Arca Last: The World That Ends and the Fruit of the Diva".

Suo padre è per metà cinese e per metà giapponese, mentre sua madre è per un quarto cinese. Le piacciono la cucina, i film, la musica, la chitarra e le freccette. Le sue abilità speciali sono il canto e la danza.
data.name: Aya Yamane

data.biography: Lang Yueting was born in 1985 in Dalian, Liaoning, China. She graduated from the Central Conservatory of Music. She is an actress and pianist, known best for her roles in "Mountain Cry", "Blind Detective", and "Office".

data.biography: Meng Lu é uma atriz chinesa nascida na província de Shaanxi e graduada pela Academia de Cinema de Pequim. Ela entrou oficialmente no showbiz em 2013 com sua participação no moderno drama de comédia familiar urbana 'May-December Love' (大丈夫) e no antigo drama de fantasia wuxia 'Age of Heroes (2014)'.
毕业于北京电影学院。2013年，因参演现代都市家庭话题喜剧《大丈夫》和古装传奇剧《英雄时代》而正式进入演艺圈。2015年，主演都市网络喜剧《小主起来嗨》。2016年，主演了以研学旅行教育为题材的现代电影《爱我吧，长安》；之后，还主演了悬疑探案类网络剧《人偶师》。
data.name: 孟璐

data.biography: 畢業於北京電影學院。2013 年，因參演現代都市家庭話題喜劇《大丈夫》和古裝傳奇劇《英雄時代》而正式進入演藝圈。2015 年，主演都市網絡喜劇《小主起來嗨》。2016 年，主演了以研學旅行教育為題材的現代電影《愛我吧，長安》；之後，還主演了懸疑探案類網絡劇《人偶師》。
data.name: 孟璐
